title: Hospital Equipment & Spare Parts — Master Catalogue

schema.type: Capital Equipment | Spare/Accessory | Consumable | Infrastructure | Software/IT | Refurbished Capital
schema.imageSearchUrl: Google Images search URL for brand + model + item
schema.notes: Caveats / installation / refurb notes (may be empty)

caveats: Prices are typical Indian-market list ranges; transacted prices vary 20-40% with configuration, AMC and vendor negotiation.
Brand and model are representative — most categories have 5-20 comparable products from competing OEMs.
imageSearchUrl is a Google Images search URL (always resolves) rather than a single static image.
Always confirm specs, regulatory status (CDSCO/USFDA/CE), AMC and warranty with the OEM/distributor before procurement.

items.notes: Common refurb option in tier-2 hospitals.

items.specifications: Real CPR Help, fully automatic option
